codebase-memory-mcp: pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command $exe = Join-Path $env:LOCALAPPDATA 'Programs\codebase-memory-mcp\codebase-memory-mcp.exe'; if (-not (Test-Path -LiteralPath $exe)) { $cmd = Get-Command codebase-memory-mcp -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($cmd) { $exe = [string]$cmd.Source } else { Write-Error 'codebase-memory-mcp.exe not found. Run the official installer first.'; exit 64 } }; & $exe - √ Connected

recommendations: 本仓 host-only feedback 面正常；后续每次修改 host/规则/自演化链时先重跑 `FeedbackReport`，再决定是否需要更高成本 gate。

next_work_selection.why: No heavy LTP package is currently trigger-selected and no safer autonomous continuation signal is available; defer heavy implementation and keep evidence/gate upkeep bounded.

allowed_actions: run repo-local build and verification commands
run bounded maintenance commands declared by the control repo
credential_scope.owner_boundary: command execution is bounded by the repo profile, host shell, and fail-closed governance checks.
credential_scope.resource_boundary: repo-local commands only; no external credential is owned or brokered by this audit surface.

audited_tools.remediation: Keep repo-profile allowlists bounded to declared commands and deny any undeclared tool family or shell surface.

allowed_actions: use host-approved local Codex session attachment
observe readiness and token expiry as host-owned state
credential_scope.owner_boundary: credential ownership remains with the operator and host product rather than this repository.
credential_scope.resource_boundary: local Codex session and host-owned sign-in token lifetime only; no repo-owned credential copy is allowed.

audited_tools.host_surface: Codex cooperation host attachment and local execution posture
audited_tools.remediation: Do not copy, broker, or extend Codex credentials; fail closed when host readiness or policy basis is missing.

allowed_actions: switch the active local provider when its credential is present
write bounded local config for the active provider profile only
credential_scope.owner_boundary: credential values remain user-owned provider env or local profile inputs outside repository storage.
credential_scope.resource_boundary: active local third-party provider only; no official subscription entitlement is assumed by the baseline.

audited_tools.host_surface: local Claude Code provider profile switching and bounded configuration
audited_tools.remediation: Require a matching provider credential before switch/apply and fail closed when the active provider boundary cannot be proven.

allowed_actions: deny by default until an explicit session scope and evidence path are declared
credential_scope.owner_boundary: this repository does not own browser or gateway credentials for default execution.
credential_scope.resource_boundary: no default credential scope; external side effects remain denied until a later bounded session contract exists.

audited_tools.host_surface: browser automation or MCP-like external side-effect surface
audited_tools.remediation: Keep browser or gateway-like actions disabled by default and require a future bounded contract instead of silently widening scope.

checks.reason: Codex analytics should be explicitly disabled for local governance runs.
approval_policy=never is an accepted operator preference only when deterministic rules are present.
checks.remediation: Keep ~/.codex/rules/*.rules present and non-empty when using approval_policy=never.

checks.reason: Codex context window and auto-compact thresholds should remain coherent before changing model defaults.
checks.remediation: Run the read-only Codex context probe from `scripts/lib/codex_local.py` through the runtime tests before changing defaults; do not restore the deleted codex-account mutation CLI.

checks.reason: Plaintext Claude login convenience is accepted, but agent reads of credential-bearing user config must be denied.
checks.remediation: Add Read denies for Claude/Codex/Gemini credential-bearing user config files.

checks.reason: Codex MCP credentials should be referenced through env vars, not expanded into config.toml.
checks.remediation: Use bearer_token_env_var for Codex MCP credentials.

checks.reason: Claude MCP config should not contain expanded bearer tokens.
checks.remediation: Keep MCP Authorization headers as environment-variable references.

catalog_probe.reason: Run with run_codex=true to inspect the local Codex model catalog.

checks.reason: model_context_window must be present and positive.
model_auto_compact_token_limit must be present and positive.
Auto compact must trigger before the configured context window is exhausted.
Auto compact ratio should stay between 75% and 90%.

context_settings_decision.decision_rule: Prefer matching bundled/refreshed `codex debug models` context_window values; keep configured auto-compact when it is below the context window and inside the guard band; otherwise derive an 81% rounded threshold.

exec_probe.reason: Run with probe_exec=true to validate the configured context settings through a minimal Codex exec request.

personal_preference_exceptions.accepted_when: credential-bearing settings files remain read-denied to agents and are not synchronized into repositories
deterministic rules, project gates, and repository policies remain active
synchronized MCP configs keep credential values indirect through environment-variable references

override_audit.limitation_note: Target repos may remove or further restrict risky tools, but they may not expand the allowlist beyond the control repo's declared registry and policy basis.
Target repos may declare provider capability unavailable on a platform that cannot satisfy the credential boundary, but they may not broaden provider scope or claim official entitlement.
